base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_block_hit_powerup — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. Power-up brick-hit frame — brick-block bumps up revealing item emerging. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Power-up brick-hit frame — brick-block bumps up revealing item emerging; same visual shape as coin-block-hit but content differs (mushroom / flower / star / 1up)
